homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, caption completely unrelated to the audio) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic instrumental track blends techno and house elements to create a hypnotic, danceable groove. Driven by a prominent four-on-the-floor kick drum and a deep bassline, the piece features synths and percussive claps that build an upbeat atmosphere perfect for a nightclub. The overall sound is lively and rhythmic, making it well-suited for DJ sets or summer parties.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, caption completely unrelated to the audio) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This upbeat track features prominent synthesizers and electronic drums driving a steady four-on-the-floor rhythm. The energetic, danceable beat creates a lively atmosphere suitable for nightclubs or high-energy workouts. Classified within the EDM and house genres, the instrumental piece maintains a consistently active pace throughout.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment is an entirely arrhythmic instrumental track built from sound design elements like static, white noise, and various electronic effects. The harsh and abrasive atmosphere creates a chaotic soundscape that feels like observing the inner workings of a revealing machine without any discernible tempo or rhythm.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track is an instrumental piece of upbeat house music driven by a strong bassline and electronic drumming. The fast-paced rhythm creates an energetic atmosphere that feels ideal for a nightclub or rave setting. While the title suggests vocals, the audio features purely synthesized sounds without any singing.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends Game Soundtrack and Light Classical styles, featuring a prominent piano melody supported by synthesizers and bass. The music maintains a steady, light groove that creates a playful atmosphere evoking a sense of adventure and exploration. While the upload metadata labels it as softrock, the composition functions primarily as an engaging background piece with subtle holiday undertones.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a prominent violin and piano performance that drives a medium tempo with a steady, dramatic rhythm. The rich interplay between these instruments creates an adventurous and exciting atmosphere suitable for a video game soundtrack. While the piece is titled "Solitude," its energetic build-up conveys a sense of movement rather than isolation.

questions.name: Sample 8
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece serves as a perfect example of traditional Middle Eastern music, featuring the mesmerizing sounds of the oud and lute. It is accompanied by the rhythmic beats of the tabla and the melancholic notes of the darbuka, where the absence of vocals allows listeners to immerse themselves in this ancient art form.

questions.name: Sample 9
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This recording captures the soothing sounds of ocean waves and nature from a small fishing port, creating a peaceful atmosphere ideal for mindfulness. The gentle rustling and binaural wave textures are presented as a field soundscape that invites listeners to appreciate the calming presence of the sea with headphones.

questions.name: Sample 10
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This lively and cheerful track features a female vocalist singing in a high-pitched, melodic voice. Her performance is supported by a fast acoustic guitar, a groovy bass line, and a prominent accordion that drives the upbeat rhythm. The song's energetic feel and festive mood make it sound like music often heard during celebratory scenes in Latin American shows.

questions.name: Sample 11
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features a solo acoustic guitar performance by Christian Zell, characterized by a slow and steady rhythmic beat. The simple yet effective melody creates a melancholic and reflective atmosphere, making the piece ideal for contemplative moments or quiet film scenes. Overall, the music conveys a somber and introspective mood through its minimalist approach.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
